{{Quote|Finance minister Gahg reports the Imperial annexation of the assets of defeated Separatist planets is nearly complete.|Mas Amedda reports Gahg's progress to Galactic Emperor Palpatine|<ref name="DT:PTN" />}}
'''Gahg''' was an individual who became the first [[Finance Minister]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="SW:CE" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] shortly after its creation at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="DT:PTN" /> One of his first tasks<ref name="SW:CE" /> was to oversee the annexation of former [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] holdings which had been seized at the end of the Clone Wars. During a meeting with [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], his aide [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]] provided a status report from Gahg, stating that the annexation was nearly complete.<ref name="DT:PTN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gahg was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' in the [[Dark Times 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''The Path to Nowhere'']] story arc published on [[November 8]], [[2006]] and written by [[Randy Stradley]] under the name Mike Harrison.<ref name="DT:PTN" /> He later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which was published on [[December 9]], [[2008]].<ref name="SW:CE" />
